title: 同室のあの子～そうだと思いましたわ～

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

One day, I notice Mejiro McQueen looking a little
more worn out than usual.

I decide to take her to the cafeteria to relax after
our training.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate this very much, Trainer. I'm feeling a
bit better now, thanks to you.
choice_data_list: Do you have any idea why you're feeling tired?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
To tell you the truth, my study session last night
was a little lengthier than usual.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't able to rely on my roommate, Ikuno, as I
usually do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I usually turn to Ikuno for help whenever I get
stuck with my studies.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Not only is she studious, but she's also very caring
of others.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: However... recently she's been forgoing races.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I do wish she would pay more mind to her own
dreams. I say this not only as a friend, but as a
rival.
Just as I'm about to respond...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Hello, Mejiro McQueen and her trainer. I hope
your day has been going well.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I believe I heard my name being mentioned. Do
you need anything?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh, not at all! We weren't discussing anything
important.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
How mortifying... I hope she didn't overhear our
conversation!

Mejiro McQueen only wants Ikuno Dictus to focus
on running, but her intentions might go
misinterpreted. I need to divert the conversation
somehow.
choice_data_list: She was talking about how you're a good friend.
She was talking about how you're a good friend.
She wants you to focus on your dream.
She wants you to focus on your dream.

text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen only wants Ikuno Dictus to focus
on running, but her intentions might go
misinterpreted. I need to divert the conversation
somehow.
choice_data_list: She was talking about how you're a good friend.
She was talking about how you're a good friend.
She wants you to focus on your dream.
She wants you to focus on your dream.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: ...I am?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Well if friends are what we're talking about, I find
Mejiro McQueen to be a wonderful example.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
While some tend toward defiance when given
advice, McQueen is always very receptive.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
It's a great help when I'm out there looking after
everyone.

As her trainer, I've come to notice these traits in
Mejiro McQueen too. She's sincere and dutiful.
choice_data_list: I think I get what you mean.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh... Really?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I knew you'd agree! McQueen isn't only diligent,
she's also hardworking and a fast learner. What's
more...

Ikuno Dictus unexpectedly breaks into her
management spiel.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
...And that is all. Thank you for this valuable
conversation, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Whenever you have time, I would like to continue
our discussion.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
P-please stop... The two of you get much too
carried away.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That's enough talk about me. I would like you to
focus more on yourself, Ikuno.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your concern. However, I'm taking
well enough care of myself, so don't you worry.

Whereas Mejiro McQueen shies from receiving
compliments, Ikuno Dictus accepts them coolly. I
feel like I've caught a glimpse of how their
relationship works.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: H-hey now! That was a little too direct!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I appreciate it.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
However, you needn't worry yourself. I always
take care not to exceed my limits. Now what I'm
more concerned about is...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
McQueen, is everything all right? I ask because
you appear quite tired.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Y-you needn't worry yourself! I'm perfectly fine,
really!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Is that so? Well if it isn't necessary, then I shan't
inquire any further.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: No! I don't mean to say that it isn't necessary...

It seems Mejiro McQueen feels a mixture of both
gratitude and guilt about Ikuno Dictus's care and
attention.
choice_data_list:
She's probably feeling bad because she makes
you worry a lot.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hey!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I-I did not say anything to that extent! Would you
please stop speaking for me as if I were a child!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Oh... Is that the case?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Then I shall respect your wishes. I will refrain from
being too attentive since it bothers you so.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh, please! Not you as well, Ikuno!

Seeing Mejiro McQueen get flustered, Ikuno
Dictus simply smiles.
